integration_validation_v2.gap: Acceptance 'merge Core/Data rows, normalize ids, mark missing as blockers' has no executable merge: DiagnosticsCoreRowMerge is a string in a Planned CommandReference name field, not a function/type. No normalization or blocker logic exists; proof is in-memory membership of 4 hardcoded command ids.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_manual/content.rs:2657-2676 (diagnostics_core_row_merge status Planned, 'Data-only', describes a merge but ships none); grep: DiagnosticsCoreRowMerge exists only in content.rs as a literal; tests/model_manual_tests.rs:728-737 (proof asserts feature-group command set, no merge execution, no managed-resource touch)

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Executable merge: src/atelier/model_manual_merge.rs:216-339 merge_manual_source_rows(CoreData) over 9 source groups, real id normalization :49-69, missing group/row -> MERGE_BLOCKER_* markers, collisions surfaced; persisted via record_manual_row_merge :642-703 into atelier_model_manual_row_merge (migrations/0122:7-37, DB CHECKs forbid no-op runs) with EventLedger mirror. Proof: tests/atelier_model_manual_merge_tests.rs:74-186 (merged count equals independently computed distinct source-command count, persisted to managed PG, re-read, MANUAL_ROW_MERGE_RECORDED ledger) and :225-282 (normalization transforms variant ids, missing rows/groups become blockers, collision blocker).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-185 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Manual Source Merge For Core Rows -- Merge Core/Data manual source rows into Diagnostics manual dataset only
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Manual Source Merge For Core Rows
